Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 686}Oh, you're taking orders? In that case, bring me a ginger ale.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 686}Wait, I changed my mind. Make that an oolong tea.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 686}What? I can't hear you! Huh? My order?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 686}Wait, I changed my mind. Make that an oolong tea.[n]{f 1 1}
